title: Environments
description: Per-repo registry mapping {dev, staging, prod} envs to project + tool-specific deploy targets. Consumed by F023 supervisor pre-dispatch validation: plan target_env/target_project must match the declared registry. All env tiers and per-tool fields are optional; only declared tiers are reachable, and supervisor rejects dispatch to undeclared tiers. Loader enforces the cross-cutting constraint that at least one of dev/staging/prod must be declared.

repo.description: Repo name. Advisory label; loader discovers the file via path-based walk-up from a plan dir.

envBlock.description: One env tier's deployment surface. At least one of firebase_project or gcp_project must be set so the registry has a project anchor for supervisor pre-dispatch validation. Loader enforces this constraint in Python.

firebase_project.description: Firebase project ID (e.g., your-app-dev). Identical to gcp_project when the project is Firebase-managed.

gcp_project.description: GCP project ID. Often equal to firebase_project for Firebase-on-GCP projects.

xcode_scheme.description: Xcode scheme name for iOS deploys (e.g., GlamSwift-Dev). Omit for non-iOS repos.

bundle_id.description: iOS bundle identifier for this tier. Omit for non-iOS repos.

hosting_target.description: firebase.json hosting target names (e.g., ['admin', 'web']). Omit if the repo uses a single anonymous hosting block or has no Firebase Hosting.

allowed_deploy_commands.description: Operator policy: explicit deploy command patterns allowed for this tier. Reserved for F023 EC11/EC12 — may be omitted in EC1+EC8 starter files and added later.

requires_gates.description: Operator policy: human_gates names required before any dispatch to this tier. Reserved for F023 EC11/EC12 — may be omitted in EC1+EC8 starter files and added later.
